titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 136: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 136. (A.R. No. 194 of 1907.) TIRUVIḌAIMARUDŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple.

The details of the date correspond to 984 A.D. October 6. It is damaged. It seems to register a sale of land situated to the north of the temple by the assembly of Tiraimūr, the dēvakanmi of the temple, the nagarattār of Tiruviḍaimarudil and Iṅgaṇāṭṭup-Pallavaraiyar, the managing trustee of the temple, to a certain Echchilkaṇḍa-Rāvaṇaṉ of Dēvaṅguḍi in Miṟai-kūṟṟam and the provision of some equipment for the worship of the God with the proceeds of the sale.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 342.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . ko
pparakecaripa
nmaṟku yāṇṭu
10 4- Āva
tu tiruviṭai
marutuṭaiyār
tevakanmikaḷ tirai
mur sabhaiyārum ti
ruviṭaimarutil nakara
ttārum Uṭaiyār śrīkā
ryamārāykiṉṟa Iṅkaṇāṭṭup
pallavaraiyaru muṭaiyār ko
yiliṉ teṟkil tirukkok
kārāṇikke poṉa tiruvācaliṉ
kiḻparaṭai Iluppaikkiḻe
tulānāyaṟṟut tiṅkaḷ kiḻa
maipeṟṟa cataiyattiṉāṉ
ṟu Iruntu vaṭakarai miṟaikkū
ṟṟattu tevaṅkuṭi tevaṅ
kuṭaiyāṉ Eccilkaṇṭa rāva
ṇaṉukku viṟṟukkuṭutta nila
māvatu tiruviṭaimarutuṭai
yār koyiliṉ vaṭakkil ma kkalāṉṟu kai
yāṟṟiṉ kiḻaicceykku Ellai piṇam pokum va
ḻikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai tirukkuḷaṅkarai
kku vaṭakkum melpārkkellaiy mayi
lukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai paḻaṅkāvirikkut te
ṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam mikutikku
ṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka puṉceyyum kollaiyum nirnilamum koṇṭu ka
lli Ivaṉe tiru lattil vāṉavaṉ peyar ceyta taṉmattukku
niṅku nilam A raikkāṇi nikki niṉṟa nilam koṇṭu Uṭaiya Irupatiṉ
poṉṉiṉ kai ceyya cāmarai Oṉṟukku poṉ 2 10 5- m Āka
tta ce ṉukku
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 136 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
